title: Large Cellophane Hampers Bags With Pull Bows, HCSSZ 10 Pack 20.5 x 27.6 Inches Hamper Basket Gift Bags, Cellophane Wrap bags for Hamper Making Easter Gift Presents Packaging
features: Premium Quality Material: Made from 1 mil OPP material, our cellophane hamper bags are non-toxic, durable, and tear-resistant, providing excellent support for baskets of all shapes and sizes to keep your gifts secure and beautifully wrapped.

Generous Size for All Occasions： Each clear cellophane gift bag measures 52 x 70 cm (20.5 x 27.6 inches), with 45 cm (17.7 inches) pull bows in 5 vibrant colors (blue, purple, red, orange, and light pink), adding a festive and personalized touch to your gifts.
Complete Wrapping Solution：This complete Large hamper wrapping bag Includes 10 large clear cellophane bags and 10 gorgeous pull bows—everything you need to create stunning gift baskets in one kit!
Effortless to Use：Simply place your basket into the bag, gather the top, and secure it with a pull bow. In seconds, your gift transforms into a stylish, professional masterpiece!

Perfect for Every Occasion：Our hamper wrapping kit is versatile and ideal for baby showers, birthdays, weddings, Easter, Christmas, Valentine’s Day, Mother’s Day, graduations, corporate gifts, and more.

Unforgettable gift : Create stunning gift baskets with our cellophane wrap for hampers and Pull Bows Kit! Designed to add elegance and sophistication, it’s perfect for baby showers, birthdays, weddings, holidays, and more. Make your gifts stand out and leave a lasting impression!
description: Product Description Specifications: Material: OPP plastic Color: clear Bag Size: Width: 52CM/20.5 inch ;Length: 70CM/27.6 inch,Thicknesses: 1 mil Pull Bows Size : Width: 2.8 cm/1.1 inch ; Length: 45 cm/18 inch Package Size :28*23*2.2 cm/11*9*0.86 inch ;weight:0.18 kg Package Includes: 10 x Cellophane Basket Bag） 10 x Pull Bows (blue,purple,red,orange,light pink) Hampers Not Included Our large hamper bag (20.5 x 27.6 inches) with a beautiful pull bow is perfect for packaging all types of gift baskets. Whether for baby shower gifts, Easter baskets, Christmas presents, or stuffed toys, this bag effortlessly accommodates them while adding an elegant touch to your gifts. The crystal-clear material and high-quality design enhance the presentation, making it an ideal choice for holiday packaging.
